description: Typer CLI entry point — declares all sub-apps (project/irc/agent/auth/template/config/channel/bot/audit/setup) and wires commands to manager classes

key_classes_functions.name: app (typer.Typer)
key_classes_functions.purpose: Root Typer app; all subcommands registered via add_typer

key_classes_functions.name: main (callback)
key_classes_functions.purpose: Root callback — resolves project, loads config, triggers background update check; enters zellij main session when no subcommand

key_classes_functions.name: _get_config
key_classes_functions.purpose: Fetch config from ctx.obj, exit if no project selected

key_classes_functions.name: _get_irc_config
key_classes_functions.purpose: Resolve IRC connection details — rejects legacy [irc] section format

key_classes_functions.name: _get_irc_manager
key_classes_functions.purpose: Construct IrcManager from resolved config

key_classes_functions.name: _get_agent_manager
key_classes_functions.purpose: Construct AgentManager (pulls username from auth, irc from resolved config)

key_classes_functions.name: _enter_main_session
key_classes_functions.purpose: Launch/attach the 'zchat' hub zellij session, emits layout.kdl + config.kdl

key_classes_functions.name: _launch_project_session
key_classes_functions.purpose: Switch/attach to project's zellij session (legacy V5 --attach flow)

key_classes_functions.name: _create_project_zellij_session
key_classes_functions.purpose: Detached-create of a project session with layout.kdl and config.kdl

key_classes_functions.name: _spawn_update_check
key_classes_functions.purpose: Daemonize zchat.cli.update --background-check for daily update poll

key_classes_functions.name: _resolve_static_choices
key_classes_functions.purpose: Resolve zellij palette plugin choice sources ('servers', 'projects')

key_classes_functions.name: _get_commands_json
key_classes_functions.purpose: Walk Typer click group to emit JSON command registry (for palette plugin)

key_classes_functions.name: _write_config_kdl
key_classes_functions.purpose: Generate zellij config.kdl with Ctrl-k -> zchat-palette.wasm binding

key_classes_functions.name: cmd_project_create
key_classes_functions.purpose: project create — interactive server/channels/type prompts + global config server registration

key_classes_functions.name: cmd_project_use
key_classes_functions.purpose: Set default project; optional --attach for V5 behavior

key_classes_functions.name: cmd_auth_login
key_classes_functions.purpose: OIDC device code flow (default) or --method local

key_classes_functions.name: cmd_irc_daemon_start
key_classes_functions.purpose: Start local ergo via IrcManager.daemon_start

key_classes_functions.name: cmd_irc_start
key_classes_functions.purpose: Start WeeChat in zellij via IrcManager.start_weechat

key_classes_functions.name: cmd_agent_create
key_classes_functions.purpose: Create agent; optional --channel for routing.toml entry_agent registration

key_classes_functions.name: cmd_agent_join
key_classes_functions.purpose: Add agent to registered channel — updates agent state + routing entry_agent

key_classes_functions.name: cmd_channel_create
key_classes_functions.purpose: Register channel in routing.toml with optional bot/external-chat/entry-agent

key_classes_functions.name: cmd_bot_add
key_classes_functions.purpose: Register bot in routing.toml + write credentials/<name>.json; supports --supervises

key_classes_functions.name: cmd_up
key_classes_functions.purpose: V6 orchestrator — starts ergo + WeeChat + cs + N bridges + missing entry_agents from routing.toml

key_classes_functions.name: cmd_shutdown
key_classes_functions.purpose: Stop all agents + WeeChat + ergo + zellij session

key_classes_functions.name: cmd_doctor
key_classes_functions.purpose: Delegate to zchat.cli.doctor.run_doctor

key_classes_functions.name: cmd_list_commands
key_classes_functions.purpose: Hidden command — dump all CLI commands as JSON for palette plugin discovery

key_classes_functions.name: _ARG_SOURCES
key_classes_functions.purpose: Static registry mapping command-arg names to palette data sources

public_interface: project_app, irc_app, irc_daemon_app, agent_app, setup_app, template_app, auth_app, config_app, channel_app, bot_app
